parameters.query:
WITH revenue_data AS (
  SELECT 
    COALESCE(SUM(revenue), 0) as total_revenue,
    COUNT(*) as total_orders,
    ROUND(AVG(revenue), 2) as aov
  FROM orders WHERE tenant_id = {{ $json.query.tenant_id }}
    AND order_date >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days'
),
page_data AS (
  SELECT 
    COALESCE(SUM(page_views), 0) as page_views,
    COALESCE(SUM(visitors), 0) as visitors
  FROM daily_metrics WHERE tenant_id = {{ $json.query.tenant_id }}
    AND date >= CURRENT_DATE - 30
),
returning AS (
  SELECT 
    ROUND(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE is_returning_customer)::decimal / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 4) as returning_rate
  FROM orders WHERE tenant_id = {{ $json.query.tenant_id }}
    AND order_date >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days'
)
SELECT 
  r.total_revenue, r.total_orders, r.aov,
  p.page_views, p.visitors,
  CASE WHEN p.visitors > 0 THEN ROUND(r.total_orders::decimal / p.visitors, 4) ELSE 0 END as conversion_rate,
  ret.returning_rate
FROM revenue_data r, page_data p, returning ret
SELECT date, SUM(revenue) as revenue FROM daily_metrics WHERE tenant_id = {{ $json.query.tenant_id }} AND date >= CURRENT_DATE - 30 GROUP BY date ORDER BY date
SELECT source, SUM(visits) as visits FROM traffic_sources WHERE tenant_id = {{ $json.query.tenant_id }} AND date >= CURRENT_DATE - 30 GROUP BY source ORDER BY visits DESC LIMIT 10

parameters.content:
## Dashboard API

Webhook-triggered API endpoints:
- GET /api/dashboard - KPIs, revenue chart, traffic sources
- GET /api/channels - Channel breakdown, Google Ads, Email stats
- GET /api/products - SKU table with metrics
- GET /api/attribution/:visitorId - Visitor journey
- GET /api/ai-referrals - AI referral stats
- POST /api/ai-chat - AI assistant

All endpoints require tenant_id query param.
